flow_metadata.description: Process webhook notifications from connectors. Translates connector events into standardized responses for asynchronous payment state updates.
Authorize a payment amount on a payment method. This reserves funds without capturing them, essential for verifying availability before finalizing.
Retrieve current payment status from the payment processor. Enables synchronization between your system and payment processors for accurate state tracking.
Cancel an authorized payment that has not been captured. Releases held funds back to the customer's payment method when a transaction cannot be completed.
Reverse a captured payment in full. Initiates a complete refund when you need to cancel a settled transaction rather than just an authorization.
Finalize an authorized payment by transferring funds. Captures the authorized amount to complete the transaction and move funds to your merchant account.
Create a payment order for later processing. Establishes a transaction context that can be authorized or captured in subsequent API calls.
Process a partial or full refund for a captured payment. Returns funds to the customer when goods are returned or services are cancelled.
Increase the authorized amount for an existing payment. Enables you to capture additional funds when the transaction amount changes after initial authorization.
Verify and process redirect responses from 3D Secure or other external flows. Validates authentication results and updates payment state accordingly.
Configure a payment method for recurring billing. Sets up the mandate and payment details needed for future automated charges.
Charge using an existing stored recurring payment instruction. Processes repeat payments for subscriptions or recurring billing without collecting payment details.
Cancel an existing recurring payment mandate. Stops future automatic charges on customer's stored consent for subscription cancellations.
Retrieve refund status from the payment processor. Tracks refund progress through processor settlement for accurate customer communication.
Upload evidence to dispute customer chargeback. Provides documentation like receipts and delivery proof to contest fraudulent transaction claims.
Retrieve dispute status and evidence submission state. Tracks dispute progress through bank review process for informed decision-making.
Submit defense with reason code for dispute. Presents formal argument against customer's chargeback claim with supporting documentation.
Concede dispute and accepts chargeback loss. Acknowledges liability and stops dispute defense process when evidence is insufficient.
Tokenize payment method for secure storage. Replaces raw card details with secure token for one-click payments and recurring billing.
Create customer record in the payment processor system. Stores customer details for future payment operations without re-sending personal information.
Generate short-lived connector authentication token. Provides secure credentials for connector API access without storing secrets client-side.
Create session token for payment processing. Maintains session state across multiple payment operations for improved security and tracking.
Initialize wallet payment sessions for Apple Pay, Google Pay, etc. Sets up secure context for tokenized wallet payments with device verification.
Initiate 3DS flow before payment authorization. Collects device data and prepares authentication context for frictionless or challenge-based verification.
Execute 3DS challenge or frictionless verification. Authenticates customer via bank challenge or behind-the-scenes verification for fraud prevention.
Validate authentication results with the issuing bank. Processes bank's authentication decision to determine if payment can proceed.

comments.account_number: Account number for ach bank debit payment
comments.routing_number: Routing number for ach bank debit payment

comments.application_expiration_month: The application expiration date (PAN expiry month)
comments.application_expiration_year: The application expiration date (PAN expiry year)
comments.payment_data: Cryptogram data for Apple Pay transactions

comments.account_verified: Indicates that identification and verification was performed
comments.card_holder_authenticated: Indicates that cardholder possession validation has been performed

comments.connector_transaction_id: Transaction identifier generated by the 3DS system.
comments.ds_transaction_id: Directory Server Transaction ID (DS Trans ID).
comments.exemption_indicator: SCA exemption indicator for this authentication.
comments.ucaf_collection_indicator: UCAF (Universal Cardholder Authentication Field) collection indicator.

comments.account_number: Account number for Bacs payment method
comments.sort_code: Sort code for Bacs payment method

comments.account_number: Account number for Becs payment method

comments.name: Customer's billing name
comments.reference: A reference to be shown on billing description
comments.statement_descriptor: Complete description that appears on customers' statements
comments.statement_descriptor_suffix: Provides information about a card payment that customers see on their statements

comments.acs_url: URL for completing the authorization flow
comments.bin: Bank Identification Number for card verification
comments.client_token: Client token for Braintree SDK initialization

comments.pem: Text-based PEM-encoded certificate string (starts with -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----)

comments.card_network: Card network returned by the processor

comments.cavv_algorithm: Algorithm used to generate the CAVV value.
comments.cb_exemption: Exemption indicator specific to Cartes Bancaires network.
comments.cb_score: Cartes Bancaires risk score assigned during 3DS authentication.

comments.connector_config: Connector-specific configuration (auth credentials, base_url override, typed metadata)

comments.is_overcapture_enabled: Additional payment method specific data Extended authorization data Whether overcapture is enabled

comments.error_message: Human-readable description of parsing failure (e.g., "Expected JSON response, got HTML")
comments.http_status_code: HTTP status from connector before parsing failed (e.g., 401, 500, 200)

comments.screenstream: SCREENSTREAM (not in enum, added at end)

comments.connector_customer_id: Connector's customer ID (e.g., Authorize.net customer profile ID)

comments.accepted_at: Timestamp when the acceptance was made (Unix timestamp, seconds since epoch).
comments.online_mandate_details: Details if the acceptance was an online mandate.

comments.provider: Identifier for the specific Eft provider/service to be used Examples: "ozow", "paystack", "instant_eft"

comments.disputes_response: Content if the event is for a dispute synchronization.
comments.incomplete_transformation: Content if the payment event transformation is incomplete and requires psync call.
comments.payments_response: Content if the event is for a payment synchronization.
comments.refunds_response: Content if the event is for a refund synchronization.

comments.event_ack_response: Suggested HTTP response to send back to the connector for webhook acknowledgement

comments.file_content: Content Options Content of the document, if it's a file.
comments.file_mime_type: MIME type of the file (e.g., "application/pdf", "image/png"), if file_content is provided.
comments.provider_file_id: Identifier for the file if stored with an external provider.
comments.text_content: Textual content of the evidence, if it's not a file or in addition to a file.

comments.connector_config: Typed per-connector configuration (replaces separate connector + auth fields)

comments.endpoint: The endpoint URL where the form should be submitted.
comments.form_fields: Key-value pairs representing the form fields.
comments.method: HTTP method to be used for form submission (e.g., POST).

comments.application_primary_account_number: The Primary Account Number (PAN) of the card

comments.description: User-facing description of the payment method

comments.html_data: The HTML content as a string.

comments.total_timeout_ms: Total timeout for entire request lifecycle (milliseconds)

comments.encoded_data: Encoded data representing the ID or related information.
comments.no_response_id_marker: Indicates that no specific ID is returned or applicable.

comments.resource_object: The resource object bytes that should be sent in PSync call

comments.bank_name: The bank name for bank transfer

comments.error_message: Human-readable error description with full context (e.g., "Missing required field 'card_exp'")
comments.suggested_action: Actionable guidance for developers to resolve the error (e.g., "Provide the 'card_exp' field in your request")

comments.country: The country for the Interac payment (typically CA for Canada)
comments.email: The email address for the Interac e-Transfer notification

comments.code: card scheme Eg: VISA, MASTERCARD etc.

comments.bank_code: The bank code for local bank transfer

comments.network_mandate_id: network_txns_id sent by Issuer to connector, Used for PG agnostic mandate txns along with card data
comments.network_token_with_nti: network_txns_id sent by Issuer to connector, Used for PG agnostic mandate txns along with network token data

comments.multi_use: Multi use mandate with amount details (for recurring payments)
comments.single_use: Single use mandate with amount details

comments.connector: The connector to create the access token for

comments.status: Status of the access token creation attempt
comments.status_code: HTTP status code from the connector

comments.initialization_token: Initialization token for Mifinity SDK initialization

comments.capture_sequence: Sequence number for this capture in a series of multiple captures.

comments.advice_code: Network advice code for retry logic

comments.cartes_bancaires: Parameters specific to Cartes Bancaires network, if applicable.

comments.issuer: Bank issuer for Czech Republic Online Banking

comments.email: Email address for finland's online banking

comments.issuer: Bank issuer for Poland Online Banking
Bank issuer for Slovakia Online Banking
Bank issuer for Thailand Online Banking

comments.ip_address: IP address from which the mandate was accepted.
comments.user_agent: User agent string of the browser used for mandate acceptance.

comments.country: Country code for UK Open Banking
comments.issuer: Bank issuer for UK Open Banking

comments.amount: Amount per quantity (in minor currency units)
comments.brand: Brand of the product that is being purchased
comments.category: Category of the product that is being purchased
comments.product_id: ID of the product that is being purchased
comments.product_img_link: The image URL of the product

comments.product_tax_code: The tax code for the product

comments.quantity: The quantity of the product to be purchased
comments.requires_shipping: Indicates if the product requires shipping
comments.sub_category: Sub category of the product that is being purchased
comments.tax_rate: Tax rate applicable to the product
comments.total_tax_amount: Total tax amount (in minor currency units)
comments.unit_of_measure: Unit of measure used for the item quantity.

comments.discount_amount: Discount applied to the order (in minor currency units)
comments.duty_amount: Duty/customs amount for the order (in minor currency units)
comments.merchant_order_reference_id: Merchant's internal reference ID for the order

comments.shipping_cost: Shipping cost for the order (in minor currency units)

comments.dpan_last_four_digits: Last four digits of DPAN (Device Primary Account Number)
comments.recurring_payment: Whether this is a recurring payment

comments.encrypted_data: Encrypted Apple Pay payment data as string

comments.sepa: Sepa - Single Euro Payments Area direct debit
comments.sepa_guaranteed_debit: SEPA Guaranteed Direct Debit - bank debit with payment guarantee

comments.status_code: HTTP status code from the connector

comments.connector_token: Connector-issued token. Replaces PaymentMethod entirely. Examples: Stripe pm_xxx, Adyen recurringDetailReference, Braintree nonce.

comments.account_id: Card and ACH account IDs per currency

comments.form: Data for constructing an HTML form for redirection.
comments.mifinity: Mifinity-specific redirection data for SDK-based flows.

comments.created_at: Unix timestamp when the refund was created
comments.status_code: HTTP status code from the connector

comments.method: HTTP method of the request (e.g., GET, POST).

comments.iban: International bank account number (iban) for SEPA

comments.mandate_type: Type of mandate (single_use or multi_use) with amount details
comments.update_mandate_id: A way to update the mandate's payment method details

comments.order_tax_amount: Total tax amount for the order (in minor currency units)
